features.featureTitle: In the About/Our Story section of frontend/src/components/About.tsx, add a full-width or prominently placed photo of the coffee stall with the owner. The image should be rendered using the generated static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/coffee-craft-stall-owner.dim_1200x800.png. Style it with rounded corners, a subtle warm brown/gold border or shadow consistent with the luxury brown palette, and generous whitespace around it. Place the image below the introductory text and above (or beside) the stats grid.

Restyle the 'Our Story' (or 'About Us') section heading in frontend/src/components/About.tsx to have a luxurious, high-end typographic treatment. Apply a layered CSS text-shadow using warm brown/gold tones (e.g., #C8A882, #A0522D, #6B3F1F) to give the Playfair Display heading a raised, embossed 3D appearance — similar in style to the 'COFFEE CRAFT' hero heading. Optionally add a thin decorative gold rule or ornamental flourish beneath the heading for extra opulence.
